title: Some Useful Signal Models
summary: This page demonstrates how to describe piecewise signals using unit step functions. Example 1.7 shows how a signal composed of a constant segment and an exponential segment can be expressed as a single mathematical expression using unit step functions. Drill 1.7 introduces reflected unit step functions u(-t) and e^(-at)u(-t) with corresponding figures.

figures.caption: Signals u(−t) and e^(−at)u(−t) illustrated for Drill 1.7, showing a unit step and an exponentially decaying signal both defined for t ≤ 0.
